text: I stand at the threshold between a quiet, minimalist room and a vibrant exhibition space. The first room feels empty—open and almost echoing, the lights sharp above, structure and stillness overwhelming. As I move into the vivid R+D space, surrounded by bright colors and displays about human and machine connections, I feel a sense of intellectual curiosity awaken. This place urges me to reflect on innovation and my own existence amid all this design and research. The transition from emptiness to stimulation leaves me both contemplative and energized.
